Watch: Kasaragod decides three-way battle: Kerala Elections 2026
articles.description: Kasaragod, Kerala’s northern gateway and “Saptha Bhasha Sangamam Bhoomi,” heads into the April 9 assembly election with a tight three-cornered contest. The Indian Union Muslim League-led UDF faces a strong challenge from the Bharatiya Janata Party, while the Communist Party of India (Marxist)-backed independent adds a third angle. UDF’s Kallatra Mahin Haji banks on legacy, BJP’s Ashwini M.L. pushes development, and LDF-supported Shanavas Padhoor targets grassroots voters. Key issues include healthcare gaps, dependence on Mangaluru, Endosulfan concerns, and linguistic rights.

articles.description: Having made his IPL debut in 2009, Ravichandran Ashwin played 221 matches for five different teams in his career, and finished as the fifth-highest wicket-taker with 187 scalps. He has also won two IPL titles with CSK in 2010 and 2011.

articles.title: Sensex ends nearly 1,700 points lower, investors lose over 8.5 lakh crore

articles.title: Ramesh Chennithala alleges scam in software contract for primary agriculture credit societies in Kerala
articles.description: Congress leader says original decision to award the contract to Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) for ₹206 crore was cancelled and a fresh tender was invited under mysterious circumstances

articles.title: Order CBI probe against Murasoli Trust, litigant urges Madras High Court
articles.description: The trust claims it to be a politically motivated litigation and accuses the litigant of not having disclosed that he is a district secretary of the BJP

articles.title: What we know so far about the Supreme Court’s ruling on reservation for converted Dalits
articles.description: The Supreme Court ruled that a person professing any religion other than Hinduism, Buddhism, or Sikhism cannot be recognised as a member of a Scheduled Caste

dailyNews.title: T.N. election 2026: When an ‘underdog’ MGR stunned many with his 1980 victory in Tamil Nadu
dailyNews.description: After President N. Sanjiva Reddy invoked Article 356 on a Sunday night in February 1980 to dismiss CMs in nine States, including Tamil Nadu’s M.G. Ramachandran, many in this State thought the victory of the Congress-DMK coalition in the Assembly poll was a given. Yet, it was the AIADMK that emerged victorious

dailyNews.title: Will petrol, diesel prices go down after excise duty cut by govt amid Iran war? Big question answered
dailyNews.description: The excise duty move comes amid disruptions in energy supplies globally due to the chokehold on key waterway Strait of Hormuz because of the US-Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Excise cuts won't change fuel price, relief only in narrative: Congress claims
dailyNews.description: Pawan Khera pointed out that these companies have been absorbing losses since the outbreak of the conflict in West Asia; "The government has now merely agreed to share a small part of that burden but reducing the 'special additional' levy - that too almost a month later," the Congress leader said.

dailyNews.title: Senate approves most DHS funding, hours after Trump promised to restart TSA pay
dailyNews.description: The Senate agreed early Friday to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security in an effort to end a standoff in Congress that led to massive lines at many airports.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he'll order DHS to start paying TSA officers as shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he will sign an executive order to restart pay for TSA officers, who have gone more than a month without a full paycheck.

dailyNews.title: President Trump's 2026 State of the Union Address and the Democratic response
dailyNews.description: President Trump delivers the longest State of the Union address in recent history, followed by the Democratic response from Virginia Governor Abigail Spanberger.

dailyNews.title: Witkoff floats Iran peace plan as Trump extends pause on energy plant strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump has extended a pause on striking Iranian energy infrastructure until April 6.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Pentagon from labeling Anthropic AI a "supply chain risk"
dailyNews.description: A judge has blocked the Trump administration from labeling Anthropic a supply chain risk and cutting off all federal work with the artificial intelligence firm, an early win for Anthropic in its bitter feud with the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he's granting Iran's request to extend pause on energy site strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced the extension of the pause "per Iranian government request."

dailyNews.title: Oil prices climb to $110 as Trump's Iran deadline extension fails to allay supply fears
dailyNews.description: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he will sign an executive order to 'immediately pay' TSA agents
dailyNews.description: Lawmakers are stalled on funding the Department of Homeland Security as airport delays mount.

dailyNews.title: David Sacks says his time as Trump's crypto and AI czar has ended
dailyNews.description: The venture capitalist said he will still be a part of the White House's Technology committee and will help push Trump's AI plan forward.

dailyNews.title: Anthropic wins preliminary injunction in DOD fight as judge cites 'First Amendment retaliation'
dailyNews.description: A federal judge in San Francisco granted Anthropic's request for a preliminary injunction in its lawsuit against the Trump administration.
